authority_boundary: Repo-local eval ports carry intake, suites, reports, and pressure evidence only. Central verdict, scoring, regression, proof doctrine, and central bundle adoption remain in aoa-evals.

valid_git_markers: .git file whose first line starts with gitdir:

route_recommendations.action: Do not create a local eval port unless current repo work produces real eval pressure.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Inspect the existing eval-like surface before mutation; add a valid port only if current pressure warrants it.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Repair the local eval-port shape and rerun the validator before applying or designing evals.

contract_limits: inventory is routing evidence, not central proof acceptance
route recommendations do not approve proposals or accept evidence
MCP and generated readers remain weaker than source ports and aoa-evals source bundles
